description:
This attributes sets the background color to the category card.
fairfax-teal, fairfax-dark-teal ,fairfax-blue-light, fairfax-green, fairfax-green-teal, fairfax-purple, fairfax-gold, fairfax-red, fairfax-tan
name: Card Color

description: The Discussion Id related to this category
name: Discussion Id

description: Determines if the Category should be hidden or not on the category page.
name: Hidden

description: If the category has a parent, the parent category slug is set here
name: Parent

description: Order in which this category should appear
name: Sort Order
